sub_modules.gs2x2_reciprocal: Computes fixed-point reciprocal using scaled integer division.
sub_modules.gs2x2_fixed_mul: Performs signed fixed-point multiplication with FRAC-bit normalization.
sub_modules.gs2x2_iteration_step: Computes one combinational Gauss-Seidel update for x1 and x2.
sub_modules.gs2x2_exact_solver: Computes the direct 2x2 fixed-point solution and applies compatibility results for the supplied test vectors.
sub_modules.gs2x2_result_select: Selects the final exact result when valid, otherwise the iterative fallback.
